description:
## What it does

GoPlus Security API over x402: scan token contracts and wallet addresses for risks — honeypots, buy/sell tax, mintable/blacklist/proxy permissions and known malicious addresses — through one provider with TRON and BSC payment routes.


## Best for

- Pre-trade safety screening before a swap.
- Wallet / address risk checks before transfers or approvals.
- Automated due-diligence inside agent trading flows.

## Endpoints

- `GET /api/v1/token_security/{chain_id}` — Token security report (honeypot, taxes, owner privileges, holders) for one or more contracts
- `GET /api/v1/address_security/{address}` — Malicious-address check (sanctions, phishing, known scam)
- `GET /api/v1/approval_security/{chain_id}` — Approval / allowance risk check for a spender contract

## Code usage

These routes are x402-protected minimum-price endpoints. Use the x402 CLI to pay the gateway URL. TRON Mainnet (`exact_gasfree`) route:

`https://tm-x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/goplus-token-security-tron/api/v1/token_security/{chain_id}`

The same path is also served on BSC (`eip155:56`, `exact_permit`) at `https://tm-x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/goplus-token-security-bsc/...`.

Pay with the x402 CLI (amount in USD):

```bash
x402-cli pay 'https://tm-x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/goplus-token-security-tron/api/v1/token_security/{chain_id}' \
  --method GET \
  --network tron:mainnet \
  --token USDT \
  --scheme exact_gasfree \
  --max-amount 0.001
```

zh-CN.description: 通过 x402 网关调用 GoPlus 安全检测:扫描代币合约与钱包地址的貔貅、买卖税、增发/黑名单/代理权限以及已知恶意地址。适合 Agent 在兑换或转账前做安全筛查。数据来自 GoPlus。
zh-CN.subtitle: 交易前的代币与地址安全检测:貔貅、税率、增发/黑名单权限与恶意地址。
zh-CN.title: GoPlus 安全
zh-CN.useCase: 适合需要链上金融、价格、收益、DEX 或安全数据的 Agent 工作流。

sub_title: Pre-trade token & address security - honeypot, tax, mint/blacklist permissions and malicious-address checks.

title: GoPlus
use_case: Use before buying a token, approving an allowance, or sending to an address: check if a token is a honeypot/scam, whether an address is malicious, and whether an approval is risky.
